subcodes.title: Li-Jinabi’l-Ahmad
subcodes.first_line: Glorified be He Who is Lord of sovereignty and the Kingdom, and glorified be He Who is Lord of might and dominion, and glorified be He Who is possessed of power and divine majesty [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: بسم الله الامنع الاقدس. سبحان ذی الملک و الملکوت و سبحان ذی العز والجبروت و سبحان ذی القدرة واللاهوت
subcodes.subjects: @transcendence; unknowability of God, @the Word of God; influence and centrality of, @God's oneness [ahadiyyih and wahidiyyih], @power and sovereignty of God; omnipotence of God
